message:
feat(linear): add linear.plan_sync operation for deterministic Beads-Linear sync planning

Add a new linear.plan_sync operation that plans a deterministic Beads to
Linear sync action without side effects. The operation accepts bead-side
and linear-side snapshots along with a conflict resolution policy
(prefer_freshest, prefer_bead, prefer_linear, manual) and produces a
SyncOperationIntent with field-level diff, direction (update_linear,
update_bead, no_op, manual_required), and an idempotency key.

- manifest.toml: add linear.plan_sync operation with input/output schemas,
  network constraints, and full metadata
- connector.rs: add invoke_plan_sync() handler with field-level title/
  description/status/priority comparison, update generate_valid_token()
  to derive capability from operation name
- integration.rs: add invoke_plan_sync_through_connector test validating
  prefer_freshest policy resolves bead-is-newer to update_linear intent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
 min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
 protocol_features = []
 max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:3827324180475df89e4993ca6f2f1ca7e077aa5697420088dab34de116e08475"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:ca99a982c0c7068a4497c5e4eafa4e9a712d3507703ec0c5207904dcd3d5144d"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.linear"
@@ -381,6 +381,56 @@ common_mistakes = ["Projects span multiple teams — do not assume a project bel
 examples = ['{}']
 related = ["linear.list_teams"]
 
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."linear.plan_sync"]
+description = "Plan a deterministic Beads ↔ Linear sync action without side effects"
+capability = "linear.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."linear.plan_sync".input_schema]
+required = ["planned_at"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."linear.plan_sync".input_schema.properties.bead]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."linear.plan_sync".input_schema.properties.linear]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."linear.plan_sync".input_schema.properties.policy]
+type = "string"
+enum = ["prefer_freshest", "prefer_bead", "prefer_linear", "manual"]
+[provides.operations."linear.plan_sync".input_schema.properties.planned_at]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."linear.plan_sync".output_schema]
+required = ["intent"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."linear.plan_sync".output_schema.properties.intent]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."linear.plan_sync".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.linear.app"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 65536
+
+[provides.operations."linear.plan_sync".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Preview the exact Beads ↔ Linear sync action before any write."
+common_mistakes = ["planned_at is required so the audit artifact stays explicit", "Provide at least one of bead or linear; both missing is not a meaningful sync plan"]
+examples = ['{"planned_at":"2026-03-15T00:00:00Z","policy":"prefer_freshest","bead":{"bead_id":"br-123","title":"New title","description":"Body","status":"open","priority":1,"updated_at":"2026-03-15T00:00:00Z"},"linear":{"issue_id":"lin-1","identifier":"LIN-123","title":"Old title","description":"Body","status":"open","priority":1,"updated_at":"2026-03-14T23:00:00Z"}}']
+related = ["linear.get_issue", "linear.update_issue"]
+
 # ── Events ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
 [event_caps]
@@ -425,3 +475,4 @@ scope = "instance"
 "linear.list_cycles" = ["linear.read"]
 "linear.add_comment" = ["linear.write"]
 "linear.list_projects" = ["linear.read"]
+"linear.plan_sync" = ["linear.read"]
